failureModes.mechanism: extract-invoice returns HTTP 200 with items:[] → runExtraction DELETE at line 1263 runs unconditionally → INSERT skipped because items.length===0
failureModes.dataImpact: All existing invoice_items deleted; invoice header may still update
failureModes.userSymptom: Re-read appears broken; line items vanish with no error toast

failureModes.mechanism: Two overlapping runExtraction calls (double-click or list+panel buttons) → both DELETE → both INSERT → 2× row count (8+8=16)
failureModes.dataImpact: Duplicate line items with GPT variance between batches
failureModes.userSymptom: Inflated row count; duplicate product names with different amounts
failureModes.guardGap: UI disables button via extracting state but runExtraction has no entry mutex; setExtracting is async state update

failureModes.mechanism: DELETE succeeds → INSERT throws (RLS, network, validation) → catch returns null → rows already gone
failureModes.dataImpact: Total data loss on transient insert failure
failureModes.userSymptom: Silent failure; items empty after re-read

failureModes.mechanism: items.length>0 but normalizedItems.length===0 after shouldRejectInvoiceIngredientRow → DELETE runs, INSERT skipped (same guard as empty)
By design: fewer extracted rows replace full prior set (e.g. 3 rows replace 9)
failureModes.dataImpact: Intentional replace semantics; may lose rows on bad extraction
failureModes.userSymptom: Fewer items than before without explicit warning
failureModes.note: Not a persistence bug per se; separate product decision

failureModes.mechanism: DELETE result/error never inspected; silent delete failure could leave stale rows then insert duplicates
failureModes.dataImpact: Stale+new mix if delete fails and insert succeeds

safeOrder: 5. IF normalizedItems.length === 0 → abort persistence, preserve DB, surface warning
6. DELETE only when replacement rows confirmed
8. check delete+insert errors; rollback strategy or abort before delete

uiButtonDisabled.effectiveAgainstDoubleClick: PARTIAL — race window before setExtracting; two entry points can overlap

corruptionManifestations: Zero items after failed/empty re-read (Aviludo April: 9→0)
Zero items after insert failure post-delete
Partial row count reduction on under-extraction (by design)
fixBelongsRationale: All invoice_items persistence is client-side in runExtraction; extract-invoice edge function is read-only for DB (index.ts:204 handoff note)
